page.title: Audit&Fix — Professional CRO Audit Reports
page.description: Find out why your website isn't converting. Get a professional CRO audit with zoomed-in screenshots of every problem — delivered in 24 hours.
hero.pre_headline: The average SMB website loses 60%+ of visitors at the first step.
hero.h1: Stop Losing Customers to a Website That Doesn't Convert
hero.subtitle: We screenshot every problem area on your site, score every key conversion factor using our proprietary methodology, and deliver a prioritised fix list — in plain English — within 24 hours.
hero.subtitle_emphasis: Every report reviewed by our senior analyst before delivery.
hero.usp: Proprietary scoring · Human judgement · Screenshots of key issues
hero_preview.alt: Sample Audit&Fix CRO audit report cover page
testimonials.1.quote: I had no idea my call-to-action button was buried below the fold on mobile. The report found it in minutes and we fixed it the same week — enquiries up 40%.
testimonials.1.author: Sarah T.
testimonials.2.quote: Straightforward, no fluff. We got a scored PDF with actual screenshots of our problem areas and a clear priority list. Our developer had it all fixed in two days.
testimonials.2.author: James K.
testimonials.3.quote: Worth every penny. The report caught that we had no trust signals above the fold at all — obvious in hindsight, but we'd been blind to it for years.
testimonials.3.author: Michelle R.
montage.title: Here's What You Actually Get
montage.subhead: A professional PDF with scored analysis, real screenshots from your site, and a ranked fix list — not a generic template.
montage.item4_caption: Prioritised fix list — quick wins first
props.1.title: Zoomed Screenshots of Every Problem
props.1.body: We screenshot the exact part of your page that's hurting conversions — so you can see it yourself, not just read about it.
props.2.title: Every Conversion Factor Scored A+ to F
props.2.body: Headline, CTA, trust signals, urgency and more — each scored independently, plus a full technical assessment of SSL, security, and mobile. You know exactly what to fix first.
props.3.title: Plain English, No Jargon
props.3.body: Written for business owners, not developers. Every finding explained with what it is, why it matters, and how to fix it.
props.4.title: $2,500 Elsewhere. $297 Here.
props.4.body: Professional CRO audits from agencies start at $2,500 and take 1–2 weeks. We deliver the same expert-level analysis — plus annotated screenshots — in 24 hours.
checklist.title: What's In Your Report
checklist.subhead: Each of the 10 conversion factors is scored 0–10 and graded A+ to F — so you know exactly where you stand and what to fix first.
checklist.1: Headline quality — does it communicate value in 3–5 seconds?
checklist.2: Value proposition — benefits, not features; "what's in it for me?"
checklist.3: Unique selling proposition — why choose you over alternatives?
checklist.6: Urgency & scarcity — legitimate pressure to act now
checklist.8: Imagery & design — authentic photos vs. generic stock
checklist.9: Offer clarity — do visitors know exactly what they get?
checklist.10: Industry appropriateness — does design fit your business model?
checklist.footer: Plus: zoomed screenshots of every problem area, a two-pass below-the-fold analysis, and a technical assessment covering SSL, security headers, and mobile responsiveness.
usp.title: Not a Checklist. Not a Sales Call. An Actual Report.
usp.p1: Free tools like Google Lighthouse score your page speed — they can't see that your headline is vague, your CTA is below the fold, or your trust signals are in the wrong place. Those are the things that actually kill conversions. We analyse all 10 of them, on the real visual page, calibrated across {sites_scored}+ websites.
usp.p2: Unlike agency audits that cost $2,500–$15,000 and target enterprise clients, we're built for small business owners. Unlike Fiverr gigs that paste a Lighthouse screenshot into a Word doc, every report comes with zoomed annotated screenshots of your actual page — and a human-reviewed fix list in plain English.
urgency.title: Every day your site underconverts, you're losing leads you already paid for
urgency.p1: If your site converts at 1% and a fix pushes it to 2%, that's double the leads from the same traffic — zero extra ad spend. The average audit uncovers 3–5 issues fixable in under an hour each.
urgency.scarcity: ⏱ Reports are processed in batches, twice daily. Order before 8 pm to receive your report by the following morning.
expert.label: A note from your analyst
expert.name: Marcus Webb
expert.title: CRO Specialist & Marketing Strategist
expert.p1: Hi, I'm Marcus. Our team has 24 years of combined digital marketing experience — and we've seen the same conversion mistakes repeated across nearly every industry. Most small business websites look fine on the surface, but subtle issues in messaging, layout, and calls-to-action silently drive potential customers away.
expert.p2: We've worked with clients across retail, trades, health, and hospitality. Our edge? We combine hands-on marketing expertise with AI analysis calibrated across {sites_scored}+ real business websites — catching issues that even experienced marketers miss.
expert.p3: Every report that comes through this system gets my eyes on it. If something doesn't look right, I flag it. You're not getting a PDF generated by a bot — you're getting a real audit backed by human judgement.
order.subtitle: Pay → We audit your URL → PDF in your inbox within 24 hours
order.email_hint: We send your report here. No newsletters or mailing lists.
order.url_hint: 🔒 Your audit is strictly confidential. We never share or publish client URLs.
order.deal_offer: First-visit offer — 20% off if you order in the next
order.paypal_note: 🔒 Secure payment via PayPal. No PayPal account needed — credit/debit cards accepted.
order.guarantee_money_body: Not satisfied with your report? Reply to your delivery email within 7 days for a full refund — no questions asked.
order.guarantee_delivery_body: If your report hasn't arrived within 24 hours of payment, email us and we'll expedite it immediately — or refund in full.
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.1.q: How long until I get my report?
faq.1.a: Reports are delivered to the email you provide within 24 hours of payment. Most are delivered within a few hours during business hours.
faq.2.a: You'll receive a professional PDF (typically 9 pages) with scored analysis, zoomed screenshots of every problem area, and a prioritised fix list.
faq.3.q: What does the report actually show?
faq.3.a: For each of the 10 conversion factors, you get: a score (0–10), a grade (A+ to F), a plain-English explanation of what's wrong, and a specific recommendation. You also get actual zoomed screenshots showing the exact problem area on your page.
faq.4.q: What if my site is already performing well?
faq.4.a: Even high-scoring sites have room for improvement. Our report identifies specific optimisations regardless of your starting point. If you're genuinely satisfied there's nothing to act on, we offer a money-back guarantee.
faq.5.a: The report identifies and prioritises the issues — implementation is up to you or your developer. Most quick wins take under an hour to fix.
faq.6.q: How is this different from free tools like Google Lighthouse?
faq.6.a: Lighthouse scores your page speed and accessibility — useful, but it has nothing to do with conversions. It can't tell you if your headline is weak, your CTA is buried, or your trust signals are in the wrong place. Those are exactly what we analyse, on the real visual page, the way a visitor actually sees it.
faq.7.q: Is there a follow-up option after I've made changes?
faq.7.a: Yes — once you've implemented fixes, you can order a follow-up benchmarking audit at 50% of the original price to measure how much your score improved. It's a great way to prove ROI on your changes to stakeholders or clients.
faq.8.a: CTA stands for Call-to-Action — the button, link, or prompt that tells your visitor what to do next. Examples: "Get a Free Quote", "Book a Consultation", "Buy Now". A weak CTA (wrong wording, wrong colour, buried too low) is one of the most common and most fixable conversion killers. Our report scores your CTA and tells you exactly what to change.
footer_cta.h2: Ready to see what's holding your site back?
footer_cta.sub: 24-hour delivery · Money-back guarantee · Plain English, no jargon
footer.confidentiality: All audits are strictly confidential. We never publish, share, or resell client data.
deal.banner: ⏰ First-visit offer: order in the next 20:00 and get 20% off — automatically applied at checkout.
vr.page_title: Turn Google Reviews into Video Content — Free Demo | Audit&Fix
vr.page_description: Turn your 5-star Google reviews into professional 30-second videos — automatically. Free demo video included. Perfect for trades, dental, and local service businesses.
vr.og_title: Turn your Google reviews into 30-second videos
vr.og_description: Your customers already wrote the script. We just filmed it. Free demo video — no signup required.
vr.hero_title: Turn your 5-star Google reviews into a 30-second video — automatically.
vr.hero_subtitle: Your customers already wrote the script. We just filmed it.
vr.example_disclaimer: Demo videos created from public Google reviews. Not a paid endorsement.
vr.steps_subtitle: From Google review to polished video in three simple steps.
vr.step1_desc: Enter your business name and niche. We scan your Google reviews and pick one that tells a great story.
vr.step2_desc: AI-powered production turns the review into a polished 30-second video with voiceover, music, and your logo.
vr.step3_desc: Download your video and share it on social media, embed it on your site, or use it in ads. It's yours to keep.
vr.form_subtitle: One free video per business. No credit card required. Yours to keep forever.
vr.email_title: Enter your email to receive your free video
vr.email_desc: We'll email you a verification link. Click it to start creating your video.
vr.email_note: We'll email you a verification link. Click it to start creating your video.
vr.email_sent_desc: We sent a verification link to {email}.
vr.email_sent_instruction: Click the link in that email to start creating your free video. It should arrive within a minute.
vr.email_sent_spam: Can't find it? Check your spam folder. The link expires in 24 hours.
vr.confirm_desc: Check your email soon. We'll send you a link to your personalised video as soon as it's ready.
vr.confirm_progress: Scanning your reviews and creating your video...
vr.faq1_q: How does the free demo work?
vr.faq1_a: We make one video from your best Google review at no cost. It's yours to keep and use however you want — no obligation to subscribe.
vr.faq2_q: What kind of businesses is this for?
vr.faq2_a: Any local service business with Google reviews — pest control, plumbers, dentists, HVAC, roofers, dog trainers, and more. If your customers leave reviews, we can turn them into videos.
vr.faq3_q: Do I need to do anything?
vr.faq3_a: Almost nothing. We handle finding reviews, creating the video, and delivering it to your inbox. The only step on your end is posting it to your socials — or we can handle that too on a retainer plan.
vr.faq4_q: How long until I receive my video?
vr.faq4_a: Most videos are delivered within 24 hours. We'll email you a link as soon as it's ready.
vr.faq5_a: Yes. Monthly subscriptions with no lock-in. Cancel whenever you want.
vr.faq6_a: Each video is about 30 seconds in vertical (9:16) format — perfect for Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and Facebook Stories. Long enough to tell a story, short enough to keep people watching.
vr.footer_cta_title: Your reviews are already there. Let's turn them into content.
vr.footer_cta_sub: Free. No credit card. One video per business.
cmp.page_title: CRO Audit Comparison — How Audit&Fix Compares | Audit&Fix
cmp.page_description: Side-by-side comparison of Audit&Fix CRO Audit vs Hotjar, CrazyEgg, Google Lighthouse, DIY audits, and hiring a freelancer. See why a done-for-you conversion audit wins.
cmp.og_title: CRO Audit Comparison — How Audit&Fix Compares
cmp.og_description: Side-by-side comparison of Audit&Fix CRO Audit vs Hotjar, CrazyEgg, Google Lighthouse, DIY audits, and freelancers.
cmp.hero_subtitle: Most tools measure speed or track clicks. None of them tell you why visitors leave without buying. Our audit analyses your actual page — the layout, the copy, the trust signals — and tells you exactly what to fix.
cmp.table_subtitle: See how a done-for-you conversion audit stacks up against analytics tools, speed checkers, and going it alone.
cmp.scroll_hint: Scroll sideways to see all options →
cmp.diff_screenshots_body: Every issue in the report includes a zoomed, annotated screenshot of the actual problem on your page. No guesswork — you see exactly what we see, and exactly where the fix needs to happen.
cmp.diff_conversion_body: Google Lighthouse tells you your page loads in 1.8 seconds. Great — but that doesn't explain why visitors leave without buying. We analyse the 10 factors that actually influence whether someone converts.
cmp.diff_nocode_body: Hotjar and CrazyEgg need you to install a script, wait for traffic, then interpret the data yourself. We work from your live URL alone. No scripts, no waiting, no data analysis degree required.
cmp.diff_fixlist_body: You get a clear, ordered list of what to fix first. Each recommendation is specific to your page — not a generic "improve your CTA" but an explanation of exactly what's wrong and how to change it.
cmp.diff_price_body: Pay once, get your report. No monthly fees, no annual lock-in, no surprise charges. If you want a follow-up after making changes, that's half price — but it's entirely optional.
cmp.diff_guarantee_body: If the report doesn't help, you get a full refund. No questions asked. We're confident the audit will surface issues you hadn't spotted — and if it doesn't, you pay nothing.
cmp.reviews_h2: A closer look at each option
cmp.reviews_subtitle: Every tool on this page exists for a reason. Here's an honest breakdown of what each one does well, where it falls short, and who it's best suited to.
cmp.review_af_what: A done-for-you conversion audit with annotated screenshots, scored conversion factors, and a prioritised list of recommendations.
cmp.review_af_how: You provide your URL and we analyse your page the way a first-time visitor would — layout, copy, trust signals, calls to action, and user flow. No tracking code to install, no data collection period. You receive a professional PDF report within 24 hours, typically around 9 pages, covering 10 scored conversion factors with specific, actionable fixes.
cmp.review_af_best: Business owners who want clear, specific answers about what's hurting their conversions — without learning analytics tools or waiting weeks for data.
cmp.review_af_limitation: It's a point-in-time snapshot, not ongoing monitoring. If you redesign your site or make major changes, you'd want a fresh audit. Follow-up audits are available at 50% off the original price.
cmp.review_af_verdict: The fastest path from "something's not working" to "here's exactly what to fix and in what order." At {price} with a 30-day money-back guarantee, there's very little risk.
cmp.review_hotjar_what: A behaviour analytics platform offering heatmaps, session recordings, and on-site surveys.
cmp.review_hotjar_how: You install a JavaScript tracking snippet on your site. As visitors interact with your pages, Hotjar records where they click, how far they scroll, and what they do before leaving. You can also deploy feedback polls and surveys to ask visitors directly what's confusing them. Over time, patterns emerge that help you identify usability problems.
cmp.review_hotjar_best: Marketers and product teams who already have steady traffic and want to understand ongoing user behaviour patterns over weeks or months.
cmp.review_hotjar_limitation: Requires installing tracking code, takes weeks to gather enough data to draw conclusions, and the analysis is entirely on you — Hotjar shows you what happened, but doesn't tell you why or what to change.
cmp.review_hotjar_verdict: A solid tool for ongoing behavioural insight, but it's not a quick answer. You need traffic, time, and the expertise to interpret what you see. It tells you where people click — not why they leave.
cmp.review_crazyegg_what: A heatmap and A/B testing tool that visualises how visitors interact with your pages.
cmp.review_crazyegg_how: Similar to Hotjar — you add a tracking script, then CrazyEgg generates click maps, scroll maps, and overlay reports showing which elements get attention. It also includes a basic A/B testing feature so you can test variations once you've formed a hypothesis. Results improve with more traffic and more time.
cmp.review_crazyegg_best: Teams running ongoing optimisation experiments who want visual data to support their decisions.
cmp.review_crazyegg_limitation: Same fundamental issues as Hotjar — code installation, a data collection waiting period, and the burden of analysis falls on you. The A/B testing feature is useful but requires you to already know what to test.
cmp.review_crazyegg_verdict: A capable tool if you already know what you're looking for. Less helpful if you're starting from "I don't know why my site isn't converting" — because it won't tell you.
cmp.review_lighthouse_what: A free, open-source tool built into Chrome that scores your page on performance, accessibility, SEO, and best practices.
cmp.review_lighthouse_how: Open DevTools in Chrome, run a Lighthouse audit, and you get scores out of 100 for four categories. It flags technical issues like slow-loading images, missing alt text, and render-blocking scripts. Results are instant and the tool is completely free. It's what most developers use to check technical page health.
cmp.review_lighthouse_best: Developers and technical users who want to identify performance bottlenecks and accessibility issues.
cmp.review_lighthouse_limitation: It's a developer tool focused on technical metrics, not conversion. A site can score 100 on Lighthouse across every category and still convert terribly — because Lighthouse doesn't evaluate your headline, your offer, your trust signals, or your call to action.
cmp.review_lighthouse_verdict: Essential for technical health, but it answers a completely different question. Use it alongside a CRO audit, not instead of one.
cmp.review_diy_what: Reviewing your own website using checklists, guides, and best-practice articles you find online.
cmp.review_diy_how: You search for CRO checklists, work through them page by page, and note what you think needs improving. Some business owners use free tools like Google Analytics or Search Console to supplement their review. The cost is zero in money but significant in time — a thorough self-audit can take days if done properly.
cmp.review_diy_best: Budget-conscious business owners with spare time and a willingness to learn the fundamentals of conversion optimisation.
cmp.review_diy_limitation: Blind spots. You can't see your own site the way a first-time visitor does — you already know what everything means, where everything is, and why you chose that layout. The things that confuse new visitors are often invisible to you.
cmp.review_diy_verdict: Better than nothing, and you'll learn useful things. But the most valuable insights usually come from an outside perspective — someone who doesn't already know your business.
cmp.review_freelancer_what: Commissioning a custom CRO audit from a freelance consultant on platforms like Upwork or Fiverr.
cmp.review_freelancer_how: You post a job or browse profiles, select a freelancer based on reviews and portfolio, agree on scope and price, then wait for delivery. Quality ranges from excellent to poor depending on who you hire. Good CRO freelancers typically charge $500–$2,000+ for a thorough audit, and turnaround is usually one to four weeks.
cmp.review_freelancer_best: Businesses with larger budgets who want a deeply customised analysis or ongoing CRO consulting beyond a single report.
cmp.review_freelancer_limitation: Wildly variable quality. There's no standardised output, turnaround can stretch to weeks, and most freelancers don't offer a money-back guarantee. You're also spending time vetting candidates before work even begins.
cmp.review_freelancer_verdict: Can be excellent if you find the right person, but the search itself is a project. For a straightforward "what's wrong with my site?" answer, the time and cost overhead is hard to justify.
cmp.faq1_q: What exactly is a CRO audit?
cmp.faq1_a: A CRO (Conversion Rate Optimisation) audit analyses your website to identify what stops visitors from taking the action you want — buying, booking, or enquiring. We score 10 key conversion factors from A+ to F, include annotated screenshots of every problem area, and give you a prioritised fix list. The report is delivered as a professional PDF, typically around 9 pages.
cmp.faq2_q: How is this different from Google Lighthouse?
cmp.faq2_a: Lighthouse measures page speed, accessibility, and SEO — useful technical metrics, but none of them tell you whether your headline is persuasive, your call-to-action is visible, or your trust signals are in the right place. Our audit analyses the actual visual page the way a real visitor sees it: layout, copy, trust signals, and user flow. It answers "why aren't people converting?" rather than "how fast does the page load?"
cmp.faq3_q: Do I need to install any tracking code?
cmp.faq3_a: No. We work from your live URL — no scripts, no tracking pixels, no cookie banners required. You receive a finished PDF report without touching your site at all.
cmp.faq4_q: How quickly do I get my report?
cmp.faq4_a: Reports are delivered to the email you provide within 24 hours of payment. Most are ready within a few hours during business hours (AEST).
cmp.faq5_q: What does the report actually include?
cmp.faq5_a: For each of the 10 conversion factors, you get: a score (0–10), a grade (A+ to F), a plain-English explanation of what's wrong, a specific recommendation, and an annotated screenshot showing the exact problem area on your page. You also get an overall conversion score and a prioritised list of fixes ranked by impact.
cmp.faq6_a: Yes — 30-day money-back guarantee, no questions asked. If the report doesn't surface useful insights for your business, you get a full refund.
cmp.faq7_a: The standard CRO Audit report identifies and prioritises the issues — implementation is up to you or your developer. Most quick wins take under an hour to fix. If you'd prefer us to handle it, our Audit + Implementation package ({price}) includes hands-on fixes.
cmp.faq8_q: Can I re-audit after making changes?
cmp.faq8_a: Yes. Once you've implemented fixes, you can order a follow-up benchmarking audit at 50% of the original price to measure how much your conversion score improved. It's entirely optional — there's no ongoing commitment.
cmp.footer_h2: Ready to find out what's costing you conversions?
cmp.footer_subtitle: Get a free website score in under 60 seconds. No sign-up required — just enter your URL.
cmp.footer_note: Free. No credit card. No tracking code to install.
vcmp.page_title: How We Compare to Other Video Review Services | Audit&Fix
vcmp.page_description: Side-by-side comparison of Audit&Fix Video Reviews vs Testimonial.to, Vocal Video, Widewail, and DIY tools. See why zero-effort AI video wins.
vcmp.og_title: How we compare to other video review services
vcmp.og_description: Side-by-side comparison of Audit&Fix Video Reviews vs Testimonial.to, Vocal Video, Widewail, and DIY tools.
vcmp.hero_h1: How we compare to other video review services
vcmp.hero_subtitle: Most video testimonial tools need your customers to record themselves. We don't. We turn the Google reviews you already have into professional videos — automatically.
vcmp.scroll_hint: Scroll sideways to see all providers →
vcmp.reviews_h2: A closer look at each option
vcmp.review_af_what: A done-for-you service that turns your existing Google reviews into professional short-form videos with AI voiceover and niche-matched footage.
vcmp.review_af_how: You sign up and we pull your best Google reviews automatically. Each review is paired with a natural-sounding voiceover, relevant B-roll clips for your industry, and background music. The finished videos are delivered to you ready to post — no filming, no editing, no customer involvement.
vcmp.review_af_best: Local businesses that want professional video content from the reviews they've already earned, without asking customers to do anything.
vcmp.review_af_limitation: You don't have direct control over the footage selection — we choose the B-roll clips based on your niche and the review content.
vcmp.review_af_verdict: The only option that produces videos without needing anyone to record themselves. If you've got Google reviews and want video content from them, this is the fastest route.
vcmp.review_testimonial_what: A widget-based platform that embeds a testimonial request form on your website, inviting customers to record video reviews in their browser.
vcmp.review_testimonial_how: You install an embeddable widget or share a dedicated link. Customers visit the page, click record, and submit a video testimonial from their device. You can then curate and display these on a "wall of love" or embed them individually across your site.
vcmp.review_testimonial_best: SaaS companies and online businesses whose customers are already comfortable recording themselves on camera.
vcmp.review_testimonial_limitation: Most customers simply never record. Response rates are typically low, which means you'll spend time chasing testimonials and still end up with a handful at best.
vcmp.review_testimonial_verdict: A solid tool if your audience is tech-savvy and willing to record. For local businesses — tradies, dentists, restaurants — the ask is usually too big, and collection rates reflect that.
vcmp.review_vocal_what: A guided video testimonial platform that walks customers through a structured questionnaire, prompting them to answer specific questions on camera.
vcmp.review_vocal_how: You create a set of questions and send customers a unique link. They open the link, read each prompt, and record their answer one question at a time. Vocal Video stitches the clips together into a polished video with your branding. It's more structured than a blank recording widget, which helps customers who aren't sure what to say.
vcmp.review_vocal_best: B2B companies that need detailed, story-driven testimonials and have customers willing to spend 5–10 minutes recording.
vcmp.review_vocal_limitation: It still requires the customer to sit down, open a link, and record themselves — the guided prompts help, but the fundamental barrier (getting someone on camera) remains.
vcmp.review_vocal_verdict: A step up from Testimonial.to's blank-canvas approach. The questionnaire format genuinely helps, but you're still dependent on customers making time to record, which is the bottleneck for most businesses.
vcmp.review_widewail_what: An enterprise-focused managed service that handles outreach to your customers on your behalf to collect video testimonials.
vcmp.review_widewail_how: Widewail assigns a team to reach out to your customers via SMS or email, asking them to record a short video testimonial. They manage the follow-ups, provide a recording portal, and handle the editing. It's a white-glove approach — you hand over your customer list and they do the chasing.
vcmp.review_widewail_best: Multi-location enterprises (car dealerships, healthcare groups) with the budget for a managed service and a steady stream of new customers to contact.
vcmp.review_widewail_limitation: Pricing starts around $500–750 per month with annual or multi-year contracts. The cost puts it out of reach for most small businesses, and even with managed outreach, the end result still depends on customers filming themselves.
vcmp.review_widewail_verdict: If you're an enterprise with budget and volume, Widewail removes the admin burden of collecting testimonials. For small-to-medium businesses, the price and contract length are hard to justify — especially when the videos still rely on customer willingness to record.
vcmp.review_diy_what: AI-powered video creation tools that let you build review videos yourself using templates, stock footage, and text-to-speech.
vcmp.review_diy_how: You sign up for a tool like InVideo or HeyGen, choose a template, paste in a review, select background clips or an AI avatar, and export the video. You have full creative control over every element — footage, voiceover, text overlays, music. Some tools also offer AI avatars that "speak" the review on screen.
vcmp.review_diy_best: Business owners or marketers who enjoy video editing, want full creative control, and have the time to produce each video individually.
vcmp.review_diy_limitation: Each video takes 30–60 minutes of your time. You need basic design instincts to avoid the "made with a template" look, and the work scales linearly — ten videos means ten sessions.
vcmp.review_diy_verdict: Maximum control, maximum time investment. These tools are genuinely capable, but "doing it yourself" means exactly that. Most business owners try a few videos, then stop because the time cost isn't sustainable.
vcmp.diff_effort_body: Every other video testimonial service needs your customers to sit down and record something. That means emails, reminders, and a lot of waiting. We skip all of it — your Google reviews are the raw material, and we do the rest.
vcmp.diff_reviews_body: You've already earned great reviews. They're sitting on Google right now, being read by a few people and ignored by everyone else. We turn them into short, shareable videos that work on every social platform.
vcmp.diff_voiceover_body: Each video features a natural-sounding AI voiceover that reads the review aloud, paired with niche-specific B-roll footage and background music. The result looks and sounds like it was made by a production studio.
vcmp.footer_h2: Ready to see one made for your business?
vcmp.footer_subtitle: We'll create a free video from one of your best Google reviews. No credit card. No obligation.
vcmp.footer_note: Free. No credit card. One video per business.

scan.page_title: Free Website Audit Tool — Score Your Site in 30 Seconds | Audit&Fix
scan.page_description: Enter your URL and get an instant website conversion score. Our AI has scored 23,000+ websites. The average? D+. Find out where you stand. Free, 30 seconds.
scan.og_title: What grade does your website get?
scan.og_description: We scored 23,000+ small business websites. The average grade? D+. Check yours free in 30 seconds.
scan.h1_sub: Check your conversion score in 30 seconds — free, no signup required
scan.subtitle: We've analysed 23,990+ small business websites. The average conversion grade? D+. See where yours stands — free, in 30 seconds.
scan.intro: Our free website audit tool scores your site across 10 conversion factors — headline clarity, trust signals, call-to-action placement, mobile experience, and more. Used by 20,000+ small business owners. No signup required.
scan.form_note: Free. No signup required. Takes about 10 seconds.
scan.teaser_blur_label: +? more issues — enter your email to unlock
scan.email_gate_desc: Enter your email to unlock all factor scores and see your biggest problem in detail.
scan.email_optin: Yes, email me tips and occasional offers from Audit&Fix
scan.email_note: We'll also notify you if your score changes. Unsubscribe any time.
scan.js_heavy_note: ⚡ This site uses advanced JavaScript — our HTML analysis gives it a neutral score. A full visual audit would provide a more accurate picture.
scan.qf_subtitle: Screenshot annotations and plain-English fix instructions for the 5 factors dragging your score down. Same-day delivery.
scan.qf_feature_1: Your 5 worst-scoring factors analysed in detail
scan.qf_feature_2: Zoomed screenshots with problem areas marked
scan.qf_feature_3: Plain-English fix instructions you can hand to anyone
scan.qf_feature_5: Price credited toward the Full Audit if you upgrade later
scan.qf_guarantee: 30-day money-back guarantee. Not happy? Full refund, no questions.
scan.full_audit_desc: Full 10-factor audit with 9-page PDF, all screenshots, and a prioritised roadmap. 24-hour delivery.
scan.audit_fix_strong: Want us to just fix it?
scan.audit_fix_desc: Full audit + we implement your top 3 fixes with before/after screenshots. 48-hour turnaround.
scan.how_title: How the free website audit works
scan.how_subhead: Our free website audit tool analyses your site the way a real visitor sees it — not just the code behind it. Here's what happens when you enter your URL.
scan.how_step_1: ✓ We fetch your page — our scanner loads your website and reads the visible content, just like a potential customer would
scan.how_step_2: ✓ 10 conversion factors scored — headline clarity, value proposition, call-to-action, trust signals, urgency, and five more — each graded 0 to 10
scan.how_step_3: ✓ Overall grade calculated — your scores are combined into a single grade from A+ to F, benchmarked against 23,990+ other small business websites
scan.how_step_4: ✓ Your biggest issue identified — we show you your lowest-scoring factor for free, with a plain-English explanation of why it matters
scan.how_step_5: ✓ Full breakdown via email — enter your email to unlock all 10 factor scores and see exactly where your site is losing visitors
scan.how_step_6: ✓ No signup, no credit card — the free scan takes 30 seconds and requires nothing but your URL
scan.how_footer: Unlike tools like Google Lighthouse that measure page speed and accessibility, our audit focuses on conversion — whether your website actually turns visitors into enquiries, calls, and customers.
scan.factors_section_subhead: Most free website checkers look at technical issues — SSL certificates, page speed, broken links. We look at the things that actually decide whether a visitor picks up the phone or hits the back button.
scan.factor_headline_body: Does your headline communicate what you do and who it's for within 3 seconds? If visitors can't tell immediately, they leave.
scan.factor_value_body: Benefits, not features. "What's in it for me?" — if your site doesn't answer this clearly, visitors compare-shop and choose someone else.
scan.factor_cta_body: Is there a clear, visible way to contact you, book, or buy? If your phone number is buried at the bottom, visitors won't scroll to find it.
scan.factor_trust_body: Reviews, licences, certifications, guarantees — the things that prove you're legitimate. Without them, visitors feel uncertain and move on.
scan.testimonials_title: What business owners say after getting their score
scan.testimonial_1_quote: I'd been spending money on Google Ads and sending traffic to a site that was quietly losing me enquiries. The free score told me enough — the full audit told me exactly what to do.
scan.testimonial_2_quote: Scored 52 when I thought we had a decent site. The report showed us the exact screenshots where visitors were losing confidence. Fixed the trust signals that weekend.
scan.testimonial_3_quote: No fluff, no generic advice. Real screenshots of my site, real explanations, and a ranked list of what to fix first. Worth every cent.
scan.montage_title: A professional report — not a generic checklist
scan.montage_subhead: A scored PDF with real screenshots from your site, 10 factors graded A+ to F, and a prioritised fix list — written for business owners, not developers.
scan.montage_img1_alt: Report cover page showing domain, score and grade
scan.montage_caption_1: Cover page with your overall grade
scan.montage_img2_alt: Factor analysis page with score bars
scan.montage_caption_3: Zoomed screenshots of the actual problems
scan.montage_caption_4: Ranked fix list — highest-impact wins first
scan.prop_screenshots_body: We zoom in on the exact parts of your page that are costing you conversions — so you can see the issue, not just read about it.
scan.prop_10factors_body: Headline, CTA, trust signals, urgency, and more — each graded independently, so you know precisely what to fix and in what order.
scan.prop_plain_english_body: Written for business owners, not developers. Every finding tells you what it is, why it matters, and exactly how to fix it.
scan.prop_agency_title: Agency Quality at a Fraction of the Price
scan.prop_agency_body: Professional CRO audits from agencies start at $2,500. We deliver the same expert-level analysis for a fraction of that — with same-day turnaround.
scan.audit_covers_subhead: Each of the 10 conversion factors is scored 0–10 and graded A+ to F — so you know exactly what to fix and why.
scan.audit_covers_footer: Plus: zoomed screenshots of every problem area, a two-pass below-the-fold analysis, and a technical assessment covering SSL, mobile responsiveness, and page speed.
scan.usp_title: Not a checklist. Not a sales call. An actual report.
scan.usp_p1: Free tools like Google Lighthouse score page speed — they can't see that your headline is vague, your CTA is buried on mobile, or that you have no trust signals above the fold. That's what loses customers.
scan.usp_p2: Unlike agency audits priced at $2,500–$15,000 for enterprise clients, we're built for small business owners. You get the same depth of analysis, delivered the same day, with no sales calls, no retainers, and no lock-in.
scan.urgency_title: Every day your site underconverts, you're leaving leads on the table
scan.urgency_p1: If your site converts at 1% and a fix pushes it to 2%, that's double the leads from the same traffic — without spending another cent on ads.
scan.urgency_scarcity: ⏱ Reports are processed in batches, twice daily. Order before 8 pm to receive your report by the following morning.
scan.urgency_note: Same-day delivery · Money-back guarantee · Credited toward Full Audit
scan.expert_p1: Hi, I'm Marcus. Our team has 24 years of combined digital marketing experience — and we've seen the same conversion mistakes repeated across thousands of small business websites.
scan.expert_p2: We've worked with clients across retail, trades, health, and hospitality. Our edge? We combine hands-on marketing expertise with AI-powered analysis that can see and read your page the same way a customer does.
scan.expert_p3: Every report that comes through this system gets my eyes on it. If something doesn't look right, I flag it before it goes out.
scan.faq_1_q: How long until I get my report?
scan.faq_1_a: Reports are delivered to your email within 24 hours of payment. Most are delivered within a few hours during business hours.
scan.faq_2_a: A professional PDF (typically 9 pages) with scored analysis, zoomed screenshots, a prioritised fix list, and plain-English explanations for every finding.
scan.faq_3_q: How is this different from free tools like Google Lighthouse?
scan.faq_3_a: Lighthouse scores your page speed and accessibility — useful, but unrelated to conversions. It can't tell you that your headline is weak, your CTA is buried, or that you're missing trust signals. That's what we look for.
scan.faq_4_q: What if my site already scores well on the free scan?
scan.faq_4_a: Even high-scoring sites have room for improvement. Our full audit uses real screenshot analysis and goes deeper than the free HTML-only scan — catching issues that only appear on the rendered page.
scan.faq_5_q: Is there a follow-up option after I've made changes?
scan.faq_5_a: Yes — once you've implemented fixes, you can order a follow-up benchmarking audit at 50% of the original price to measure your improvement.
scan.faq_6_a: Our Quick Fixes and Full Audit reports give you everything your developer needs to action the changes. If you'd rather not deal with it yourself, our Audit + Fix option includes implementation of the top 3 fixes — we do the work and send you before/after screenshots as proof.
scan.footer_cta_h2: Ready to see what's holding your site back?
scan.footer_cta_sub: Same-day delivery · Money-back guarantee · Credited if you upgrade to Full Audit
scan.exit_heading: Not ready for the full audit?
scan.exit_desc: Screenshot annotations and plain-English fix instructions for your 5 worst-scoring issues. Same-day delivery.
scan.checklist_1: ✓ Headline quality — does it communicate value in 3–5 seconds?
scan.checklist_2: ✓ Value proposition — benefits, not features; "what's in it for me?"
scan.checklist_3: ✓ Unique selling proposition — why choose you over alternatives?
scan.checklist_6: ✓ Urgency & scarcity — legitimate pressure to act now
scan.checklist_8: ✓ Imagery & design — authentic photos vs. generic stock
scan.checklist_9: ✓ Offer clarity — do visitors know exactly what they get?
scan.checklist_10: ✓ Industry appropriateness — does the design fit your market?
